plugins.name: bluesky
plugins.description: Bluesky (AT Protocol) channel plugin for ZeroClaw: notification poll + threaded post replies over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: mattermost
plugins.description: Mattermost channel plugin for ZeroClaw: v4 REST channel-post polling + createPost over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: redact-text
plugins.description: Redact secrets and PII from text: emails, bearer/API tokens, and configured patterns
plugins.author: ZeroClaw Labs

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram channel plugin for ZeroClaw: getUpdates long-poll + sendMessage over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: twitter
plugins.description: X/Twitter channel plugin for ZeroClaw: mentions polling + reply tweets over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet
